Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

Q: What payment methods do you accept?
A: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover, and PayPal. Enterprise customers on annual plans may also pay via bank transfer.

Q: Can I get a refund?
A: Yes, refunds are available within 30 days of purchase. Digital products are non-refundable after 48 hours of download or activation.

Q: How do I cancel my subscription?
A: Go to Account Settings > Subscription > Cancel Subscription. Cancellation takes effect at the end of your current billing period.

Q: How long does delivery take?
A: Standard shipping takes 5–10 business days within the US. Expedited options (2–3 days) and overnight shipping are also available.

Q: Is my payment information secure?
A: Yes. Card details are handled by our PCI-compliant payment processor and are never stored on Axiom servers.

Q: How do I contact support?
A: Standard support is available Monday–Friday, 9 AM–6 PM ET. Enterprise subscribers receive priority support with a 4-hour response guarantee.

Q: Can I export my data?
A: Yes. Submit a data portability request to privacy@axiom-llc.com and we will deliver your data within 14 business days.
